name: 4'x5'6" Printed Twilight Tufted Kids' Rug - Pillowfort™: Skid-Resistant Star Pattern, Medium Pile, OEKO-TEX Certified
description: Energize your child's playroom, study area or nursery with the lively charm of the Printed Nylon Tufted Rug from Pillowfort™. This rectangular accent rug is adorned with a fun print on a contrasting solid background for sweet look. Crafted from a soft and lightweight material, this tufted rug features a medium-pile construction to add an additional layer of comfort underfoot, and it boasts a latex backing to help keep the rug in place on the floor. Whether they lie on it to enjoy a good book, play board games or watch TV, this decorative printed rug makes a fun and functional addition to your kiddo’s indoor space.
